title: Naming of persistent BATs is fragile
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE foo (id Int32, bar_id Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO foo (id, bar_id) VALUES (1, 1), (2, NULL), (3, 3);
SELECT f.id, b.name FROM foo f LEFT JOIN bar b ON f.bar_id = b.id WHERE f.bar_id IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Naming of persistent BATs causes data integrity issues
